description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a long, rectangular footprint and a dark gabled roof. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with blue window shutters and wooden trim accents. A detached garage with a flat roof sits adjacent to the main house, connected by a paved driveway and walkway. The front facade features a covered porch area, while the rear includes a small enclosed patio or sunroom. The property is set on a neatly manicured lawn with a simple, angular lot shape. Multiple windows are distributed along the length of the building, providing ample natural light to the interior.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light walls, blue shutters, and a detached garage on a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and detached garage with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gabled roof and the narrow profile of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed patio or sunroom and the back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a single large window on the end wall.
